title: Update GasRefillPanel with new Gas Changed and Refill Delivered dates

requirements.text: Update `frontend/src/components/GasRefillPanel.tsx` to display the 'Cooking Gas Changed On' section with the following layout: a 'Previously on:' sub-label listing '24th Dec 2025' and '26th Jan 2026', and a 'Latest on:' sub-label showing '2nd Mar 2026'. Additionally, update the 'Refill Delivered On Below Dates:' section to use the same 'Previously on:' / 'Latest on:' layout: 'Previously on:' listing '8th Dec 2025' and '21st Jan 2026', and 'Latest on:' showing '3rd Feb 2026'. Keep all existing card styling consistent with the rest of the panel.

quotes:
Cooking Gas Changed On
Previously on:
24th Dec 2025
26th Jan 2026
Latest on:
2nd Mar 2026

Refill Delivered On Below Dates:
Previously on:
8th Dec 2025
21st Jan 2026
Latest on:
3rd Feb 2026

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Cooking Gas Changed On' section displays a 'Previously on:' group containing '24th Dec 2025' and '26th Jan 2026'.
The 'Cooking Gas Changed On' section displays a 'Latest on:' group containing '2nd Mar 2026'.
The 'Refill Delivered On Below Dates:' section displays a 'Previously on:' group containing '8th Dec 2025' and '21st Jan 2026'.
The 'Refill Delivered On Below Dates:' section displays a 'Latest on:' group containing '3rd Feb 2026'.
The card styling remains consistent with the rest of the GasRefillPanel.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not change any other panels or components beyond GasRefillPanel.tsx.
nonGoals: Changes to backend logic or Motoko code.
Changes to MilkDeliveryPanel, WeatherPanel, PrayerTimesPanel, or App.tsx.
Any new data persistence or API integration for gas/refill dates.
